scripts.build: pnpm --filter @smithy-mcp/functions run build && pnpm --filter @smithy-mcp/ingestion run build && pnpm --filter @smithy-mcp/cdk run build
scripts.quality: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @smithy-mcp/functions run typecheck && pnpm --filter @smithy-mcp/ingestion run typecheck && pnpm --filter @smithy-mcp/cdk run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @smithy-mcp/functions run test && pnpm --filter @smithy-mcp/ingestion run test && pnpm --filter @smithy-mcp/cdk run test
